# SIMS Nepal Site

> A concise description of the SIMS Nepal platform.

SIMS Nepal provides cloud-based student information management, SSO integration, and scheduling tools for Nepali schools.

## Important Pages
- [Home](/): Overview of the platform.
- [Features](/features/): Detailed feature list.
- [Pricing](/pricing/): Subscription options.
- [About](/about/): Company mission and team.
- [Contact](/contact/): Get in touch.

## Contact
